title: cardamine pratensis subsp. atlantica
intro: Cardamine pratensis subsp. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic spring cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
